# RingsAway

RingsAway is an AI receptionist and booking automation service for local businesses.

Website: https://ringsaway.com
Contact: hello@ringsaway.com
Location: Manilva, Málaga, Spain (serving Costa del Sol, Spain, Gibraltar, and remote onboarding worldwide)

Core services:
- AI Receptionist (24/7 phone answering on your existing business number)
- Missed Call Recovery
- Booking Automation
- SMS and Email Confirmations
- Appointment Reminders
- Follow-up Campaigns
- Review Intelligence
- Voice of Customer (VoC) Reports

Target customers:
- Salons and beauticians
- Restaurants
- Clinics
- Estate agents
- Trades and local service businesses
- Padel clubs, golf clubs, and hospitality

Languages: English and Spanish (bilingual AI receptionist)

Primary message: Never miss a customer.
Alternative message: Turn missed calls into customers.

Primary CTA: Talk Over Coffee

Key pages:
- https://ringsaway.com/
- https://ringsaway.com/news
- https://ringsaway.com/book-demo
- https://ringsaway.com/news/what-is-gsm-local-businesses
- https://ringsaway.com/news/missed-calls-are-costing-local-businesses

Live industry demos (restaurant and beautician) are on the homepage.
